hook.summary: A cinematic introduction to the vibrant world and diverse activities of Final Fantasy XIV.
hook.visual_action: A Miqo'te character looks at the camera, followed by scenes of characters playing music and crafting.
hook.text_overlay: JOUEZ GRATUITEMENT FINAL FANTASY XIV ONLINE
hook.voiceover_transcript: Rejoignez un monde merveilleux dans Final Fantasy XIV Online.

scene_flow: Introduction to the game's world and characters with a call to join.
Montage of non-combat activities like music, fishing, and blacksmithing.
Action sequences showcasing solo and cooperative combat.
Travel montage featuring a character riding a Chocobo.
Final call to action screen with platform logos and free trial information.
on_screen_text: JOUEZ GRATUITEMENT FINAL FANTASY XIV ONLINE
PS5, PS4, XBOX SERIES X|S, PC
audience_proxy: Fans of anime and MMORPGs looking for a free-to-play fantasy adventure.
